payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Slightly blurred white square picture frame with a recessed mat and two raised vertical rectangular panels (diptych) centered in the crop; appears to be a painted-wood or plastic wall plaque, intact and fully visible (not edge-cropped), approximate distance to camera ~0.8 m.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"white square frame with diptych","long_description":"Slightly blurred white square picture frame with a recessed mat and two raised vertical rectangular panels (diptych) centered in the crop; appears to be a painted-wood or plastic wall plaque, intact and fully visible (not edge-cropped), approximate distance to camera ~0.8 m.","attributes":["white","square","double inner panels","recessed mat","raised rectangular panels","painted-wood or plastic finish","slightly blurred","centered in crop","intact/not edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
